1: import test from 'node:test'
2: import assert from 'node:assert/strict'
3: import { add } from './src/math.mjs'
4: 
5: for (let index = 0; index < 80; index += 1) {
6:   test(`add case ${index}`, () => {
7:     assert.equal(add(index, 2), index + 2)
8:   })
9: }

state.title: bench-targets/large-log/math.test.mjs

part.text: The issue is clear: **`bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs:2`** has a bug. The test expects `add(index, 2)` to return `index + 2`, but the implementation returns `a - b` (subtraction instead of addition).

metadata.diff:
Index: /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-19T22-15-13-025Z/tokenwarden-large-test-log-debug-1/repo/bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs
===================================================================
--- /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-19T22-15-13-025Z/tokenwarden-large-test-log-debug-1/repo/bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs
+++ /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-19T22-15-13-025Z/tokenwarden-large-test-log-debug-1/repo/bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
 export function add(a, b) {
-  return a - b
+  return a + b
 }

filediff.patch:
Index: /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-19T22-15-13-025Z/tokenwarden-large-test-log-debug-1/repo/bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs
===================================================================
--- /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-19T22-15-13-025Z/tokenwarden-large-test-log-debug-1/repo/bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs
+++ /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-19T22-15-13-025Z/tokenwarden-large-test-log-debug-1/repo/bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
 export function add(a, b) {
-  return a - b
+  return a + b
 }
